extension.summary: Import widget backups and preloaded skin settings.
extension.description: Downloads or opens a widget backup ZIP, imports Skin Shortcuts XML or Arctic Fuse 3 Skin Variables shortcut JSON into the active skin profile, offers a direct built-in MacBook AF3 setup import including nodes and skin settings, preloaded DutchTech AH2 widgets, bundled MacBook AF3 shortcut nodes, and MacBook AH2/AF3 skin settings sources, optionally retargets Fen-style paths to another video add-on, and creates a restore backup before overwriting anything.
